the function should check if each note in the sequence is within the specified vocal range by converting the note strings into numerical values and comparing them to the bounds. the function will iterate through each note in the list, convert it to a numerical value, and verify that it falls within the lower and upper bounds. if all notes pass this check, the function returns true, otherwise false.  

the function must ensure that all notes are valid and that the bounds are properly formatted. it should handle cases where the bounds are not in the correct format or where the notes are out of range. the function should also account for the fact that some notes may be in different octave ranges, which can affect the overall vocal range. the function must be robust and handle any input that adheres to the required format.
